name: SpitfireCloud
description: Measured PAS/FRD polar dataset for Spitfire Cloud. MLS SPL FRD measurements only (phase, GIFs, filters, diffraction, VituixCAD full-space and driver response files excluded). Verbatim source values, no smoothing/normalisation/resampling.
status: vertical files present locally; horizontal files not yet synced into this folder
notes: This file is not read by the loader (measuredDatasetLoader.jsx ignores metadata.json). It is documentation only.
